column1: LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
VARIABLES state, channel, marker, snapshot, recorded, finished
/\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

column2: -> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

column1: Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue
VARIABLES file, chunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, MAX_RETRIES, channel, timeout
VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId, committed, aborted, snapshot, writes, reads, status
